hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer release compatible with Java 17.
Change the Maven compiler release property to target Java 17.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 17-specific APIs are used.

hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17 bytecode and source level, reinforcing the migration intent.
